# Advisor feedback 2026-03-25

From the committee check-in. Paraphrased.

- "Your thesis is trying to be three papers at once. Pick one."
- "The batch-effect work is the most mature — lead with that."
- "CRISPR screen angle is interesting but it's an aim 3 at most, not a
  whole chapter. Don't let it balloon."
- "Start writing chapter 2 now, don't wait until aim 3 is finished."

## Takeaways
- Narrow. Narrow. Narrow.
- Draft chapter 2 by April 15.
